gitCommit.subject: chore: pin Node version to 22 via .nvmrc
gitCommit.body:
chore: pin Node version to 22 via .nvmrc

Document the supported runtime so local environments match the Node 22 CI runner and the aligned @types/node version.

subs.title: standard user can log in and land on inventory @smoke @ui @auth
locked out user sees a clear login error @ui @auth @negative
user can add and remove an item from the cart @smoke @ui @cart
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="cart-list"] [data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Remove' })
user can complete checkout for selected products @smoke @ui @checkout
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Bike Light' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
Click locator('[data-test="inventory-item"]').filter({ hasText: 'Sauce Labs Backpack' }).getByRole('button', { name: 'Add to cart' })
user can sort products by price from low to high @ui @catalog

shards.name: Shards
shards.description: Suite type is shard (only in shading mode)

fill="green" opacity="0.8" /><animateTransform from="0,0" to="0,0" pos="0,10" attributeName="transform" type="translate" dur="0.2s" fill="freeze" repeatCount="1" restart="always" /></g><g class="mcr-pie-path-flaky"><path d="" fill="orange" opacity="0.8" /><animateTransform from="0,0" to="0,0" pos="0,-10" attributeName="transform" type="translate" dur="0.2s" fill="freeze" repeatCount="1" restart="always" /></g><g class="mcr-pie-path-skipped"><path d="" fill="gray" opacity="0.8" /><animateTransform from="0,0" to="0,0" pos="0,-10" attributeName="transform"
